posts.raw_content:
The now infamous Aliens.gov purports 3.12 deportations.  That is largely self deports.  

https://cmsny.org/two-million-deportation-myth-ice-enforcement-distorting-data/

USAFacts.Org:
Repatriations are executed by both ICE and CBP. CBP repatriation data is not available after 11/2024, but ICE repatriated 319,980 in FY 2025; Between October 2025 and January 2026, ICE removed 144,378 individuals; on pace to reach over 430,000 total removals by the end of FY 2026."   You can't divide self deportations and call it a monsterous success.

Going faster isn't a problem.  There is no will.  Because of the national security emergency, The courts have ruled Posse Commitatus is allowable. So why isnt the military activated?  

US COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE NINTH CIRCUIT RULED IN FAVOR OF THE EXECUTIVE BRANCH'S EMERGENCY AUTHORITY—TEMPORARILY ALLOWING THE POSSE COMITATUS SUSPENSION TO STAND—NEWSOM V. TRUMP AND THE RECONVENED STATE OF OREGON V. TRUMP. 

Even if PC wasnt allowed we are failing: There are 22000 ICE agents.  If 2 agents led a ten man team of 2 local Leo and 6 national guard back up (authorized in PC), that would be 11,000 teams.  Or 110,000 officers.  
If each team arrested a conservative 10 people per day (just one person per team member) that would be 110,000 arrests per day.   

220 federal working days per year ( less holidays, weekends, 30 days vacation).  Thats 24,200,000 million ACTUAL deports possible in ICE officers leading teams for a year.

I sent a fleshed out plan based on above, to the WH comms team, office of the Pres, National Security advisor, VP,  State dept and DHS. Going faster isnt a problem. Actually Doing So is.

I didn't include Border Patrol. Or all DHS officers, which totals 80,000.
Now add military, national guard and a bounty program. 

"ooooo. Look at the doomer."  I was 25 yrs USCG. Every person is expected to achieve results. This production is a weak at best.  "Oh but its better than Biden" By that standard the Coast Guard could save 10 people and capture 1pound of drugs. But it doesnt.
